name: Best Nursing Courses & Certificates [2026] | Coursera
snippet: Nursing courses can help you learn patient care techniques, medication administration, health assessment, and ethical decision-making. Compare course options to find what fits your goals. Enroll for free.

name: Free Nursing Courses - Online Nurse CPD & Training - FutureLearn
snippet: Our portfolio of nursing courses offers learning opportunities for newly qualified nurses through to experienced nurses looking to progress into leadership roles.

name: Learn nursing - edX
snippet: Browse available online nursing courses and programs to start today. Why learn nursing? Every day, nurses provide life-saving care for people in need. Nurses play a significant role in clinical settings, from taking vitals and educating patients to collecting data and administering medication.

name: 400+ Nursing Online Courses for 2026 | Explore Free Courses
snippet: Develop essential clinical skills from patient assessment to specialized care in oncology, cardiac, and geriatric nursing. Prepare for NCLEX certification and advance into nursing informatics through courses on Coursera, Study.com, and YouTube, combining theoretical knowledge with hands-on practice.

name: Nursing Fundamentals: Key Skills Training with 3D Simulation
snippet: This online nursing course for beginners is a flexible, self-paced program that includes immersive video content, interactive 3D models, real-life case studies, and gamified learning to help you explore basic nursing skills at your convenience.

name: Best Online Nursing Courses and Programs | edX
snippet: Nurse practitioners (NPs), clinical nurse midwives, and nurse anesthetists are all different career path options. Enroll in biology and life sciences courses on edX to get an introduction to many areas of study relevant to a nursing education.

name: Free Online Nursing Courses - NurseJournal.org
snippet: Explore free online nursing courses that cover infection control, trauma care, workplace safety, and more. Earn CEUs, gain valuable skills, and advance your nursing career at no cost.
